summary: Frontend-only testing for Hymn app via mobile viewport (390x844). Executed 17 UI assertions covering signup, persistent login, tab navigation, +center button from Today/Timeline, Today cards + card navigation, Add Event -> Timeline appearance -> Detail -> Edit flow, logout, sign-in with existing user, and forgot-password with security question reset. All 17 assertions passed. Test credential password (test@hymn.app) was inadvertently left as 'NewPass123!' by the forgot-password test; restored back to 'TestPass123!' via direct API call so future runs work. Deprecated RN web warnings detected (shadow* -> boxShadow, props.pointerEvents -> style.pointerEvents) - non-blocking web-only warnings.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' on web. Likely from centerButton shadow* props. Reference: /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx:130-133. Cosmetic only - does not affect functionality but should migrate to boxShadow for web parity.

Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' - pointerEvents used as a prop on <View> instead of via style. Reference: /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx:22 and :106. Non-blocking.

action_items: Optional: migrate shadow* style props to boxShadow (or platform-branch) to silence web deprecation warnings in /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx centerButton styles.
Optional: move pointerEvents="box-none" from prop to style.pointerEvents on the two <View> wrappers around the center + button (RN 0.81 deprecation).
critical_code_review_comments: Auth-gate flow, JWT persistence via expo-secure-store, and Expo Router group navigation work correctly.
Event CRUD end-to-end (create -> list -> detail -> edit -> updated list) works via /api/events endpoints.

Forgot-password 3-step flow (email -> security answer + new password -> success -> go to sign in) works and login with new password succeeds. NOTE for main agent: the reset-back-to-original step inside the Playwright script did not complete (no exception, but final restore step likely got interrupted). Testing agent recovered the credential via direct backend call - not a product bug.
seed_data_creation: Created a fresh signup user autotest+<timestamp>@hymn.app for the signup flow. Also created a couple of events under both the fresh user and test@hymn.app for timeline/detail/edit testing. No cleanup performed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test@hymn.app / TestPass123! (security answer 'blue') is confirmed working via /api/auth/login (JSON body {email, password}). All testIDs listed in review request exist and are functional. Add Event modal is presented as a stack modal on /event/add. Timeline groups events by date descending; row testID = timeline-event-<eventId>. Edit screen navigates back to Detail after save.
